title: hymenoxys greenei
intro: Hymenoxys greenei, also known as Greene's tickseed, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hymenoxys greenei include reducing pain and inflammation, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting immune function. Hymenoxys greenei can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
